title: sqlite3_update_hook gives incorrect table name with shared cache
bug_features_seed: CREATE TABLE users (id INTEGER PRIMARY KEY, name VARCHAR(255) NOT NULL, age INTEGER CHECK(age >= 0), created_at TIMESTAMP DEFAULT NOW());
CREATE TABLE orders (id INTEGER PRIMARY KEY, user_id INTEGER, amount FLOAT NOT NULL, order_date TIMESTAMP DEFAULT NOW(), FOREIGN KEY(user_id) REFERENCES users(id));
UPDATE orders SET amount = NULL WHERE id = 1;
SELECT * FROM orders WHERE amount IS NULL;
key_bug_features: sqlite3_update_hook with shared cache returns wrong table name
